title: verbascum × chrysopolitanum
intro: Verbascum × chrysopolitanum, also known as the Golden Mullein, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × chrysopolitanum include reducing inflammation, calming irritated tissues, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and ointments for topical use, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health conditions.
